scope: local-only queued-lane evidence coverage, model registry coverage, runtime lane queue validation, and selected RealVisXL project readiness snapshot

script_updates.change: Scope coverage to the active runtime queue when present, recognize repaired local package-smoke matrix evidence for queued lanes, record excluded nonqueued authored lanes, and emit UTF-8 no-BOM JSON.

Allow the explicit none_local_package_smoke_matrix_complete current-lane sentinel, allow non-blocking completed local/target runtime statuses without converting them to final certification, compare coverage count to queued lanes, support runtime_boundaries, and emit UTF-8 no-BOM JSON.

claim_boundary: This validates local readiness/evidence-chain consistency for the current active runtime queue and selected RealVisXL lane.

This does not claim final project completion, final image quality certification, exact character/reference identity certification, full-body proof, gold-standard body-mask proof, body/hand/contact geometry authority, live S3 upload, or a new EC2 target-runtime run.
next_action: Checkpoint/reuse the RealVisXL runtime smoke, pullback, and image QA evidence, then advance to the next concrete non-mask implementation/orchestration task without rerunning EC2 for this completed proof.
